name: qproof-tools
description: Open-source post-quantum readiness tooling by qproof — scanner, MCP server, conformance battery, and CI action.
author: Dandelion Labs <hello@dandelionlabs.io> (https://dandelionlabs.io)

scripts.//test:coverage: Node built-in coverage (P1-8). Globbing packages/*/test/*.test.ts from the root works because node --test expands the glob itself; tsx is loaded via --import so the TS sources run directly. If a future Node makes root globbing flaky, fall back to: npm run test:coverage --workspaces --if-present with a per-package script.
